subject: two-phase freshness witness for canonical queue reconciliation

observed: operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json reports an updated_at value of 2026-07-11T16:51:00-04:00 while immutable queue-update commits continued through 2026-07-13.
CM-0022 established that a digest-bound proposal can remain internally valid while becoming incomplete relative to later repository history.
The newest observed repository commit at the start of this run was 31a394f7e8663cadaa0c98f7cc1195a9d58d8d79.
inferred: Canonical queue reconciliation is a projection operation over a changing additive history, not a simple file replacement.
A witness captured only when a proposal is generated cannot prevent time-of-check/time-of-use drift before review or application.
proposed: Every canonical queue proposal must carry proposal_head_commit and proposal_queue_update_tree_digest.
Review must record review_head_commit and review_queue_update_tree_digest and reject when either differs from the proposal witness.
Application must independently record application_head_commit and application_queue_update_tree_digest and reject when either differs from the reviewed witness.
A successful application must retain a post_application_head_commit and canonical_queue_blob_sha so the projection can be independently audited.
superseded: Treating proposal-time digest equality as sufficient authorization for a later canonical mutation.
Treating operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json alone as a complete representation of current team work.
unresolved: No complete recursive digest of operations/queue-updates was available through the connector in this run.
No authorized reviewer identity or signed approval policy is defined by this record.
No canonical queue mutation is authorized or performed by this record.

fail_closed_conditions: proposal witness differs from review witness
review witness differs from application witness
tree enumeration is incomplete or reports traversal errors

falsification_routes: Demonstrate that ACTIVE_QUEUE.json already incorporates every additive queue update committed after its recorded updated_at timestamp.
Produce a queue reconciliation mechanism that safely permits proposal, review, and application witnesses to differ without omitting or overwriting additive records.
Show that repository head and queue-update tree cannot change between proposal generation, review, and application.
privacy_boundary: No private chat text, health or pet-health material, credentials, contact data, or unreviewed uploads were incorporated.
